entry.headline: Jump's AI Meeting Assistant Reaches 27,000 Advisors as $105M Raise Signals Scaled Adoption
entry.the_so_what: With 27,000 advisors already using an AI-native meeting and CRM workflow tool — and $105M in fresh capital behind it — firms that have not yet standardized AI-assisted advisor productivity infrastructure are now measurably behind a rapidly scaling industry baseline.
entry.summary: The source article was inaccessible due to a 403 error, and all enrichment sources returned unrelated content — no substantive details about Jump's capabilities, use case, funding terms, investors, or business model could be retrieved from any of the provided sources. Based solely on the article URL, Jump raised $105 million and had reached 27,000 financial advisors as of March 2025. No further facts about the product, capability evidence, or strategic context can be confirmed from available source material.

key_stat.label: financial advisors reached — from article URL only; source content unavailable

capability_evidence.evidence: Article URL references 27,000 financial advisors reached, implying live deployment at scale — but no product details, capability description, or impact metrics were accessible from the source.
capability_evidence.metric: 27,000 advisors (from URL only; no quantified productivity impact available from source)
